title: Codex autonomy cockpit P0
user_task: As Eva, list recent Codex sessions, rank the cockpit inbox, inspect cited evidence, and create only dry-run approval context without reading raw transcripts.
proof_boundary: Dry-run P0 scenario contract for Codex autonomy cockpit. It may prove public-safe recent-session cards, cockpit ranking, and dry-run approval context, but does not prove live Codex control, GUI mutation, Claude parity, business-source parity, or 1.0 readiness.
next_action: Run the new cockpit tools through the local OpenClaw gateway and record only cards, refs, reason codes, counts, and sanitized proof markers.
